location: Little St. James Island, U.S. Virgin Islands
text: UN official Terje Rod-Larsen and wife Mona Juul reportedly flew on Epstein's plane to his private island, Christmas 2010-2015
Maxwell and Epstein enticed minor victims to travel to residences in NY, FL, NM for abuse — indictment, 1994-1997
Epstein flew Paris Orly Oct 7, 2012; scheduled meetings with multiple associates Oct 8-14 in Paris and then London Oct 16-17.
Epstein planned trip to Stockholm to meet Swedish scientific network chapter and scientists at hotel, Oct 2012.
Contact told Epstein a young woman would fly to New York for two weeks for him to meet her, February 2012.
